Type: A small brass key with faded enamel on the handle. A tag attached to it reads 'V' in messy handwriting. It looks worn from daily use.
A torn piece of paper, hastily crumpled and partially smoothed out. Some words are smudged, but it looks like Vera was writing something important before throwing it away.
An Apple iPhone 16 resting on the desk. The screen lights up but requires a word password. Several unread notifications are visible.
A small yellow sticky note stuck to the back of a drawer. It reads: 'Password = birthday + fav food.' The handwriting is unmistakably Vera’s.
